IMPORT_HISTORY.TITLE: Import History
IMPORT_HISTORY.COPY: Track uploads, owners, and processing status across your workspace.

MATCHER.TITLE: Transaction Matcher
MATCHER.SUBTITLE: Review matched items and exceptions.
MATCHER.CONFIRM_HINT: Confirmation clears this group for Journal Ready.

EMPTY.ALL_GROUPS: No reconciliation match groups have been created yet. Import a file to begin.
EMPTY.CONFIRMED_POSTED: No confirmed or posted groups are available.
EMPTY.NEEDS_CONFIRMATION: All groups are confirmed, or imports have not produced reviewable matches yet.

EVENTS.EMPTY_COPY: Import and commit a file to generate reconciliation events.
EVENTS.EMPTY_FILTERED_COPY: Adjust the stage, source, or status filters to widen the timeline.
EVENTS.EMPTY_FILTERED_TITLE: No events match the current filters
EVENTS.LEVEL3_COPY: Sales verification and source matching events
EVENTS.LOADING_COPY: Refreshing grouped events across imported batches.
EVENTS.PENDING_COPY: Still open in the current workflow
EVENTS.SUBTITLE: Trace Level 3 and Level 4 activity by import batch, stage, source, and current resolution status.
EVENTS.TITLE: Reconciliation Events

MATCHER.READ_ONLY_CONFIRM_HINT: Read only. You need RECONCILIATION.CONFIRM to complete this step.

SALES_VERIFICATION.ACCESS_COPY: You need ADMIN.RECONCILIATION.VIEW or an equivalent scoped permission to view this queue.
SALES_VERIFICATION.EMPTY_COPY: No Level 3 exceptions match the current filters. All records are resolved or currently in a different stage.
SALES_VERIFICATION.EMPTY_TITLE: No items in the review queue
SALES_VERIFICATION.SUBTITLE: Review Level 3 reconciliation exceptions before records continue into bank-side settlement matching.
SALES_VERIFICATION.TITLE: Sales Verification Queue
SALES_VERIFICATION.TOTAL_EVENTS_COPY: Open Level 1 and Level 3 items in this queue

WAITING.EMPTY_COPY: All gateway records have settlement IDs and are progressing through Level 4 matching.
WAITING.LOADING_COPY: Refreshing records that need settlement IDs before bank matching can continue.
WAITING.QUEUE_STATE_COPY: Reflects the current matcher backlog only
WAITING.RECORDS_COPY: Items currently blocked on settlement enrichment
WAITING.RESOLVER_ACCESS_COPY: Actions are shown only when the current user has the required scope
WAITING.SUBTITLE: Gateway records without a settlement ID stay here until a resolver attaches the correct ID and requeues them for Level 4 matching.
WAITING.TITLE: Waiting Queue

WORKBENCH.SELECT_SOURCE_TYPE_ERROR: Please select a source type above.

NEEDS_BANK_MATCH.CONFIRMED_COPY: Confirmed groups are ready to progress toward posting.

NEEDS_BANK_MATCH.NO_IMPORT_COPY: No gateway import record is linked to this transaction yet.
